question: Why did the new flight-control servo show a 2.4x higher in-service removal rate on the Pacific fleet vs Atlantic in the last 60 days?
metric_label: In-service removal rate by part, route corridor, 60-day window

upstream_models.description: In-service removal events from Maximo MRO. Includes part_number, tail_number, removal_date, removal_code, and fleet_corridor.
Route corridor exposure per tail per day from Teamcenter. Includes route_corridor (Pacific vs Atlantic), salt_air_exposure_index, and cycles.
Part master with supplier, material spec, and vendor-change history. Includes vendor_effective_date and gasket_vendor_code — key for the December supplier switch.
AS9100 quality events and shop findings from Apriso MES. Links removal events to inspection findings and failure mode classifications.
